scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('public/manuale-utente.html','dist/manuale-utente.html');fs.copyFileSync('public/manuale-utente.html','dist/manuale-utente');const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/_routes.json','utf8'));['/manuale-utente.html','/manuale-utente'].forEach(p=>{if(!r.exclude.includes(p))r.exclude.push(p)});fs.writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json',JSON.stringify(r));console.log('✓ manuale-utente copiato in dist/')"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
